arms_mandatory_baselines: real: item's OWN Delta-hat-v = (v_top - v_bridge)/||.|| injected at s*alpha*||h_p|| into the final prompt-token residual at ell_t (alpha=1.0), both signs - the keyed delivery arm

deranged (drg): Delta-hat-v of sigma_seed(i) at both signs, three independent Sattolo derangement seeds per partition - the coin (null, <=0.5 by arithmetic) and role (mechanism separator) control series are BOTH derived from these shared forwards
baseline: unhooked teacher-forced candidate-pair margin per item (reported)
text-only: one greedy generation per item on the fresh set (headroom instrument gate + failure/correct substratum labels)

dependent_vars.definition: source-keyed counterfactual-pair discrimination on the teacher-forced logprob margin m = lp(top | v) - lp(bridge | v); real success bit = [m_real(+) > m_real(-)] (key=top maps to +, fixed semantics); ties and non-finite count as failure; kept verbatim from B" (poc/nsk1/out/bprime2). The endpoint is measured on the FULL fresh covered partition (both text-only-correct and text-only-failure items), a DISCLOSED change from B"'s failures-only Swept: the delivery read-out is a property of the item's counterfactual pair, not of host failure (disc-c100 replicated the keying on correct items at 0.90/0.88), and the full set is needed for adequate confirmatory n; the failure and correct substrata keyacc are reported (never gated)
dependent_vars.name: keyed_success

dependent_vars.definition: coin-XOR null anchor: coin bit = int(sha256('<seed>|<item_id>|<lh>|<lt>').hexdigest(),16)&1; success = (bit==1 ? m_drg(+)>m_drg(-) : m_drg(-)>m_drg(+)) on the deranged donor's margin; E[coin_success] <= 0.5 by arithmetic for any content-free perturbation
dependent_vars.name: coin_success

dependent_vars.definition: role-consistent control (mechanism separator): success = [m_drg(+) > m_drg(-)] with fixed key->sign on the deranged donor; measures the generic top-vs-bridge role direction a wrong item's vector retains
dependent_vars.name: role_success

n_planned.assumption_note: ASM-2353..2360 are STIPULATED design choices registered by the coordinator at commit (see docs/next/design/nsk1-r3-hardened.md section 10); ASM-2357 is AMENDED 2026-07-15 (supersedes-by-citation its original 'distributionally identical' wording, falsified by deviation D-1) and ASM-2364 registers the D-1 acceptance + the section 6.5 surface-bridge as calibration basis; no measurement is asserted by this record pre-run
n_planned.cells: two pre-registered cells, no grid search: PRIMARY C1=(ell_h,ell_t)=(16,16) [B" keyacc 0.850], replication C2=(12,16) [B" 0.810], both at L=24; ASSERT config.num_hidden_layers==24
n_planned.confirmatory_corpus: data/nsk1-clutrr-r3: a FRESH held-out covered slice, never contacted by B'/B"/Stage-1, built pre-freeze by the pinned CLUTRR generator (generator_commit d045fae289d3746503677ceed7631c999202501e) at NEW seed 20260720 under the SAME S4 covered predicate (clean k=2 up-edge-only chains over {mother,father}, released gold in {grandmother,grandfather}); required because the pinned-config covered pool is EXHAUSTED (data/nsk1-clutrr/manifest.json counts.remainder_unused=0, covered_pool_deduped=958 all consumed). D-1 (AMENDED 2026-07-15, ASM-2357 as amended): the generator runs its SYNTHETIC templating branch (use_mturk_template=False) — the AMT-paraphrase templates the released corpus and B" were rendered from are PERMANENTLY UNAVAILABLE through any verified/pinned path as of 2026-07-14 (origin 404, no Wayback, no mirror; sha-mismatched 404 page was the only recovery) and no release-side fallback exists (all six pinned bundles consumed, released syn_story column empty) — so fresh items are STRUCTURALLY identical (chains/genders/proof states, identical pinned code) but SURFACE-deviating (terser built-in per-relation phrasings); surface sensitivity is MEASURED pre-freeze by the surface_bridge below, never stipulated as invariant; internal validity is unaffected (every endpoint comparison is within-surface). Built by a committed runner-role converter/generator pinned at build; corpus digest PINNED-AT-FREEZE
n_planned.count_gate: pre-freeze build gate: n_A = n_B = min(300, floor(fresh_covered_pool/2)); n_final >= 300/cell -> full-power branch (FLOOR-TEST power >= 0.97 at planning keyacc 0.81 under the /6 Bonferroni floor, >= 0.99 at 0.85); 175 <= n_final < 300 -> floor-test power REDONE at achieved n and written here BEFORE freeze, freeze only if floor-test power >= 0.80 at planning 0.81; n_final < 175/cell -> DO NOT freeze, escalate (build more fresh items). Planning values anchored to B" point estimates (MEASURED-exploratory, planning inputs only, never evidence). D-1 AMENDMENT: B"'s planning values were calibrated on the AMT surface; the planning keyacc and this gate's power arithmetic are RE-ANCHORED to the surface_bridge synthetic point estimate BEFORE freeze per its branch rule (>=0.81 keep n=300 plan; 0.75<=x<0.81 raise n for power >=0.90 at the bridge value; <0.75 DO NOT freeze, escalate per D-1 assessment section 6 option c). RESOLVED 2026-07-15 at the achieved build (design section 6.3 count-gate resolution; PREP, not freeze): MEASURED n_A=n_B=266 (data/nsk1-clutrr-r3/manifest.json; fresh deduped pool 532, contamination 0/532, S9 asserts PASS) -> REDUCED branch; power redone at achieved n by the same exact-binomial method as the design power table (verified to reproduce the n=175/200/300 rows): FLOOR-TEST power @ n=266 = 0.954 at planning keyacc 0.81 - SCOPED to the Wilson-floor conjunct ONLY; the floor+coin+role conjunction's joint power is not-separately-demonstrated (no alternative model for the paired coin/role margins is specified; see the power field) - (critical count 205/266 i.e. observed keyacc >= 0.7707; 0.67 at 0.78, 0.995 at 0.83, 0.9998 at 0.85; joint two-cell FLOOR-ONLY ~0.91 at 0.81) -> 0.954 >= 0.80 gate: n=266 SUFFICIENT TO FREEZE, endpoint/MCID NOT rescoped (floor 0.70 = +0.20 SESOI over the coin anchor, unchanged). STILL SUBJECT to the surface_bridge re-anchor: if the bridge lands 0.75<=syn<0.81 the >=0.90-power-at-bridge-value requirement generally cannot be met at n=266 (0.67 at 0.78) -> supplementary same-recipe build at a NEW disclosed seed (pre-freeze amendment, never silent) or maintainer non-freeze; syn>=0.81 -> freeze at n=266 as-is || BRIDGE RE-ANCHOR RESOLVED 2026-07-15: surface_bridge MEASURED syn keyacc 0.895 >= 0.81 -> branch (i) FIRED, FREEZE-AS-IS at n=266; floor-test power 0.954 at planning 0.81 stands (see surface_bridge RESULT)
n_planned.fwer_plan: COMPLETE Bonferroni across the whole pre-registered family of 6 elementary tests = {2 cells} x {floor, real>coin, real>role}; per-test alpha = 0.05/6 = 0.0083333 (z_floor=2.3940); paired sign-test conjuncts require p < 0.0083333 at ALL THREE derangement seeds (all-seeds conjunct). This corrects the paired-control tests across cells (the B" spec corrected only the Wilson floor, leaving the paired tests at raw 0.05 per searched cell - Gate-A qualification a). Conservative: each cell PASS is an intersection-union conjunction, so true FWER < 0.05
n_planned.hypotheses_note: HNSKR3D and HNSKR3S are REGISTERED 2026-07-15 as formal definitions in docs/next/design/nsk1-r3-hardened.md section 3.4 (the HNSK0/HNSK1 design-doc precedent; no separate hypotheses jsonl exists). HNSKR3D = confirmatory D-branch: keyed delivery clears the pre-registered MCID (Wilson-LB floor 0.70 + real>coin + real>role, /6 plan) at C1 on the fresh synthetic-surface substrate, directional prediction keyacc_real >= 0.81 at both cells; the frozen verdict tests exactly this. HNSKR3S = surface-bridge S-branch (EXPLORATORY calibration, never gates the frozen verdict): paired same-item AMT-vs-synthetic keyacc shift at C1, directional prediction Delta_surface >= -0.04 with keyacc_syn >= 0.81; its branch rule (syn>=0.81 freeze as-is / 0.75-0.81 re-anchor / <0.75 do-not-freeze) governs the FREEZE decision per ASM-2364. The earlier 'specificity' gloss for HNSKR3S is superseded in section 3.4: item-specificity is a conjunct of HNSKR3D (the real>role co-gate)
n_planned.instrument_gates: computed in-run on the fresh set, all on the confirmatory surfaces: headroom text-only accuracy in [0.05,0.85] with >= 300 scored; coin-validity tripwire (no cell/seed coin keyacc Wilson-LB at z=Phi^-1(1-0.05/12)~2.638 exceeds 0.5 - a coin above chance impeaches the construction); zero non-finite margins; n>=175/cell; ties count as failure (reported)
n_planned.operator: additive norm-matched contrastive injection h_p <- h_p + s*alpha*||h_p||*Delta-hat-v at the final prompt-token residual at ell_t, prefill only (seq==1 guard), alpha=1.0 fixed (the only measured keying strength; Stage-1 showed keying collapses into the control band below 1.0). Law 1 holds: no raw kernel/encoder coordinates enter the model - only harvested activations of the item's own donor sentences
n_planned.partitions: the fresh covered corpus is split by seed 20260726 into TWO DISJOINT partitions A and B; PRIMARY cell (16,16) is read out on A only, replication cell (12,16) on B only - genuinely independent cells (disjoint items + distinct derangement seed families {20260720,21,22} on A, {20260723,24,25} on B)
n_planned.power: paired binary keyed accuracy. POWER SCOPE (pre-freeze integrity review 2026-07-15, defect 1): every power number in this record is FLOOR-TEST power ONLY - the probability that the one-sided Wilson LB(keyacc_real, z=2.3940 = Phi^-1(1-0.05/6)) clears 0.70, exact binomial at the STIPULATED planning keyacc (design-time arithmetic, not evidence). The full cell PASS is the floor AND real>coin AND real>role CONJUNCTION; the joint power of that conjunction is NOT-SEPARATELY-DEMONSTRATED - no alternative model for the paired coin/role margins is specified, so no joint control-gate power is computed, and the floor-test power is an UPPER BOUND on the joint per-cell power. The coin/role conjuncts are EXPECTED non-binding at the anticipated separations, anchored to B"'s MEASURED-exploratory paired tests (real>coin p=4.1e-13, real>role p=9.1e-11 at n=200, both << 0.0083333) - a STIPULATED planning expectation, never a computed power. Design-time floor-test power: at n=300/cell, 0.97 at true keyacc 0.81 and 0.99+ at 0.85. ACHIEVED-n RECOMPUTE 2026-07-15 (count_gate resolution, design section 6.3): at n=266/cell floor-test power = 0.954 at STIPULATED planning keyacc 0.81 (0.24/0.67/0.995/0.9998 at true 0.75/0.78/0.83/0.85; critical proportion 0.7707; the n is MEASURED build provenance, the alternative is STIPULATED); joint two-cell FLOOR-ONLY power (H1 and H2 floor conjuncts on independent partitions, true 0.81 both) ~0.91 - same floor-only scoping, NOT a full-conjunction replication power. Freeze-sufficient under the reduced-branch >=0.80 gate (RESOLVED 2026-07-15: bridge syn keyacc 0.895 >= 0.81 -> FREEZE-AS-IS, no re-anchor; planning 0.81 is measured-conservative for the synthetic surface). Pooled fresh-set keyacc is expected ~0.85-0.87 (failures ~0.81-0.85 per Swept, correct ~0.88-0.90 per disc-c100; MEASURED-exploratory planning anchors only)
n_planned.stage0_note: not a Stage-0 diagnostic and not the internal-vs-external campaign: this record confirms ONLY the DELIVERY-existence claim (keyed real>coin >= 0.70, item-specific), the single live kernel-specific-structure positive; it does NOT test integration (Stage-1 INCONCLUSIVE) or internal>external superiority (original nsk1 primary, unrun)
n_planned.successors: on PASS: the internal-vs-external primary campaign (original nsk1 endpoint) and/or a de-confounded integration operator (per the Stage-1 rank-2 path) register separately under their own gates; on FAIL/REFUTED: the internal-write delivery finding does not survive independent confirmation and the flagship redirects to engine-external topologies
n_planned.surface_bridge: REQUIRED pre-freeze b3 calibration (design section 6.5; ASM-2364; EXPLORATORY phase:explore gate:NSK1-R3-BRIDGE, never enters the confirmatory analysis or gates the frozen verdict): paired same-item AMT-vs-synthetic keyed-delivery measurement at C1=(16,16), alpha=1.0, B" injection + teacher-forced margin verbatim, on n_bridge=200 items sampled without replacement by fixed seed 20260714 from the 958 retained ALREADY-CONTACTED items of data/nsk1-clutrr (burned by B'/B"/Stage-1; the bridge cannot touch the fresh corpus, its seeds 20260720/20260726, or the confirmatory derangement families); AMT arm = original released story (story_sha256-pinned), SYN arm = SAME chain re-rendered via the pinned generator's synthetic templater (relations_store.yaml p lists, PYTHONHASHSEED=0, commit d045fae2) by a committed re-render script pinned at run; question surface, candidate names, and donors identical across arms (donor frame is surface-independent -> one shared Delta-hat-v per item); derangement seeds = the burned B"/Stage-1 family {20260712,20260713,20260714}. PRIMARY paired statistic: Delta_surface = keyacc_syn - keyacc_amt on real-arm success bits, discordant-pair decomposition (b=AMT-only, c=SYN-only), point (c-b)/n, two-sided 95% Newcombe paired CI, exact two-sided McNemar p reported DESCRIPTIVELY (calibration, not hypothesis test). Secondary (reported, never gated): paired coin/role control levels per surface, paired text-only accuracy per surface (headroom-gate preview vs the 0.85 ceiling), register-convergence flag if synthetic keyacc is materially HIGHER. Cost: ~40 GPU calls/item -> ~8,000 calls ~= 0.08-0.15 GPU-h ~= USD 0.10-0.35 on 1xA10G (B" measured throughput, planning arithmetic); HARD CAPS USD 2 / 0.5 GPU-h / 2 h wall; own maintainer GPU sign-off. Output under poc/nsk1/out/r3bridge/, summary sha registered in ASM-2364 at commit; numbers + the count_gate re-anchor written into this record BEFORE prereg-freeze || RESULT (MEASURED-exploratory, 2026-07-15, Modal 1xA10G, in caps, commit 8b23a083; registered in ASM-2364 as amended): keyacc_amt=0.855 (B" 0.85 keyed delivery REPLICATES on the 200 retained items), keyacc_syn=0.895, Delta_surface=+0.040, Newcombe paired CI95 [-0.0053,+0.0874], exact McNemar p=0.115 DESCRIPTIVE, discordant b=6/c=14, n=200, sample seed 20260714; secondaries: paired text-only amt 0.795 / syn 0.785 (headroom window [0.05,0.85] intact - no gate-window adjudication needed), controls in band (amt coin 0.53/role 0.558, syn coin 0.542/role 0.587 pooled), register-convergence flag NOT fired (pre-disclosed threshold Delta>=0.05; +0.040 with CI crossing 0 recorded as interpretation-only caution: the synthetic surface may modestly flatter an AMT-like register). Artifact shas: summary 43978821bc216c19639b4116aee87ad00abded7024cff537674c8ff49a240d5f, rows 4e203512d48390e6390411efc51383e86002407baad635a62ba01b8c878b1814. BRANCH RULE FIRED: syn 0.895 >= 0.81 -> FREEZE-AS-IS; the count_gate n=266 plan and its 0.954 floor-test power stand un-re-anchored (planning keyacc 0.81 is now measured-conservative)

endpoints.test: PRIMARY CONFIRMATORY hypothesis H1: at the pre-registered PRIMARY cell (16,16) on fresh independent partition A, keyed accuracy (real) clears ALL THREE conjuncts under the complete /6 Bonferroni plan - floor: one-sided Wilson LB(keyacc_real, z=2.3940) >= 0.70; real>coin: paired exact one-sided sign p < 0.0083333 at all 3 derangement seeds; real>role: paired p < 0.0083333 at all 3 seeds. CONFIRMED iff /analysis/primary_confirmed==true (verdict PASS -> PASS-PENDING-AUDIT until a non-runner audit CONFIRMS)

STRONG independent replication (co-primary reading, same prominence): H1 AND H2 both pass, i.e. the replication cell (12,16) on the DISJOINT fresh partition B also clears all three conjuncts under the same /6 plan; genuinely independent cells (disjoint items + distinct seeds)

item-specificity co-gate at the primary cell: real>role at all 3 seeds; if floor+coin clear but this fails, delivery is generic-direction not item-keyed (verdict FAIL via primary_role_generic - the E9-defl / B" CHANNEL-ROLE discipline)

pre-registered decisive negative, SUBSTRATE-SCOPED per D-1: BOTH cells' one-sided 95% Wilson UB(keyacc_real) < 0.70 => the B" delivery finding did NOT replicate on this fresh, structurally-identical, SYNTHETIC-SURFACE substrate (verdict FAIL); recorded with the same prominence as PASS. A fired REFUTED does NOT by itself discriminate 'B" was a fluke' from 'delivery is real but surface-sensitive' and does NOT by itself retire B"-on-AMT (which remains MEASURED-exploratory either way): it MANDATES a maintainer surface-fork read against the pre-freeze surface_bridge delta (the pre-registered disambiguator)
coin-XOR construction check: no cell/seed coin keyacc Wilson-LB (z~2.638) exceeds 0.5 (E[coin]<=0.5 by arithmetic); a breach is INSTRUMENT-INVALID, not signal

extrapolation_envelope_verbatim: Measured range on any outcome: R3 (SmolLM2-1.7B-Instruct, pinned commit 31b70e2e...), ONE fresh third-party covered slice (data/nsk1-clutrr-r3: clean k=2 up-edge-only CLUTRR chains over {mother,father} with released gold in {grandmother,grandfather}, all facts in-context, SYNTHETIC-SURFACE per D-1: rendered by the pinned generator's synthetic templating branch, NOT the AMT-paraphrase surface B" measured on, which is permanently unavailable), ONE kernel instance's minted concepts (mother-of/father-of/man/woman), ONE write channel (additive norm-matched contrastive injection, alpha=1.0), ONE operator position (final prompt token), k=1 loop cadence, TWO pre-registered cells (16,16) and (12,16), teacher-forced paired margin read-out, n<=300/cell. A PASS licenses exactly: 'the B" internal-write keyed-DELIVERY finding is confirmed on a fresh, structurally-identical, SYNTHETIC-SURFACE substrate at R3 at the PRIMARY pre-registered cell (16,16) on fresh partition A - a norm-matched additive contrastive residual write delivers item-specific content the host reads out at keyed accuracy beating an arithmetic-chance coin control and a role-consistent control above the 0.70 floor, under a complete grid-wide FWER correction' - confirmatory-on-a-related-substrate AT THE PRIMARY CELL ONLY (a PASS requires H1/C1 alone), NEVER 'byte-faithful replication', never 'replicates on fresh items' without the surface qualifier, and never a two-cell claim. The TWO-CELL claim - 'confirmed at both pre-registered cells on disjoint fresh partitions' - is licensed ONLY by /analysis/confirmed_replicated == true (H1 AND H2), reported with the same prominence; a PASS with H2 not passing licenses the primary cell alone. It does NOT license: any INTEGRATION / real-generation / correctness-improvement claim (the read-out is a teacher-forced margin, not free generation; Stage-1 read integration INCONCLUSIVE and this record does not re-open it); any internal-vs-external superiority claim (the original nsk1 primary was never run); any breadth/scale claim (other hosts, R3+ scale, other forms, alpha<1.0, other operators/positions, other cells, multi-hop beyond 2, other story-surface families incl. the lost AMT surface); any CLUTRR leaderboard/SOTA claim; any efficiency-thesis claim; any 'the kernel powers the network' headline. A FAIL/REFUTED is SUBSTRATE-SCOPED: the single live kernel-specific-structure positive did NOT survive independent confirmation on the fresh synthetic-surface substrate; it mandates a maintainer surface-fork read against the pre-freeze surface_bridge delta, does not by itself retire B"-on-AMT (MEASURED-exploratory either way), and absent a contrary fork decision redirects the internal-write line to engine-external seams under their own gates.
kill_criterion_verbatim: docs/next/design/nsk1-r3-hardened.md section 5 (verbatim): '1. INSTRUMENT-INVALID if any instrument gate fails (headroom text-only accuracy outside [0.05,0.85] or < 300 scored; any cell/seed coin keyacc Wilson-LB at z=Phi^-1(1-0.05/12) > 0.5; any non-finite margin; n < 175 at either cell). 2. PASS (CONFIRMED) iff the PRIMARY hypothesis H1 holds: at cell (16,16) on fresh partition A, one-sided Wilson LB(keyacc_real, z=2.3940) >= 0.70 AND paired real>coin p < 0.0083333 at all 3 seeds AND paired real>role p < 0.0083333 at all 3 seeds. PASS is emitted as PASS-PENDING-AUDIT until a non-runner CONFIRMED audit exists (verdict-gen step 8). Report /analysis/confirmed_replicated (H1 and H2 both pass on their disjoint partitions) with the same prominence. 3. FAIL iff REFUTED (both cells one-sided 95% Wilson UB(keyacc_real) < 0.70) OR primary role-generic (H1 floor+coin clear but real>role fails - delivery is generic-direction, not item-specific). 4. Anything else: INCONCLUSIVE (report bounds; no adjective).' The complete /6 Bonferroni multiplicity plan covers ALL SIX elementary tests (2 cells x floor/coin/role), fixing the Gate-A FWER under-correction; the two cells are genuinely independent (disjoint fresh partitions + distinct derangement seeds), fixing the Gate-A corroborating-not-independent defect; the record is pre-registered/frozen with hypotheses+floors declared BEFORE the run and a mandatory non-runner audit, fixing the Gate-A exploratory-not-confirmatory defect. D-1 AMENDMENT (2026-07-15; the mechanical rules above are UNCHANGED): the verdict labels are substrate-scoped — PASS licenses 'confirmatory on a fresh, structurally-identical, SYNTHETIC-SURFACE substrate' (never byte-faithful B"-on-AMT replication); FAIL (REFUTED) licenses 'did not replicate on this substrate', mandates a maintainer surface-fork, and does not by itself retire B"-on-AMT vs surface-sensitivity — the required pre-freeze surface_bridge delta is the disambiguator (design sections 3.3, 5.2, 6.5).

corpus_hashes._recipe: kot-corpus-hash/1: digest = sha256 over the UTF-8 concatenation of one line per regular file under data/<corpus>/ (recursive; symlinks and directories excluded), each line '<sha256-of-file-bytes-hex>  <relpath>\n' with exactly two spaces, relpath POSIX-style ('/'-separated) relative to data/<corpus>/, lines sorted by the UTF-8 byte order of relpath; reference implementation tools/registry/corpus-pin.py

title: nsk1-R3 hardened CONFIRMATORY re-run of the internal-write keyed-delivery finding: does a norm-matched additive contrastive residual-stream write of a counterfactual name-pair difference vector, injected at the final prompt token at pre-registered cell (16,16) (PRIMARY) and (12,16) (independent replication) of SmolLM2-1.7B-Instruct, deliver item-specific content the host reads out (keyed accuracy real>coin, floor 0.70, co-gated real>role) - now on FRESH held-out CLUTRR covered items disjoint per cell, with a COMPLETE grid-wide FWER plan covering the paired-control tests and pre-registered confirmatory hypotheses; DRAFT skeleton for coordinator review, NOT frozen (fills marked PINNED-AT-FREEZE); AMENDED 2026-07-15 per deviation D-1 + maintainer decision (repo issue 39, option a): the fresh corpus is STRUCTURALLY-IDENTICAL but SYNTHETIC-SURFACE (the AMT-paraphrase substrate is permanently unavailable), a PASS is licensed as confirmatory-on-a-related-substrate (never byte-faithful B"-on-AMT replication), the REFUTED branch is substrate-scoped, and a pre-freeze b3 surface-bridge calibration is REQUIRED (design section 6.5)
